metadata.name: BharatHealth-Bench
metadata.description: 200-question evaluation benchmark for LLM agents on NFHS-5 India district health data

Is improved sanitation correlated with lower stunting rates at district level?
questions.gold_pandas_code: from scipy import stats; pair = df[['improved_sanitation_pct','stunting_pct']].dropna(); result = stats.pearsonr(pair['improved_sanitation_pct'], pair['stunting_pct'])

questions.question: Is there a relationship between open defecation (lack of sanitation) and wasting?
questions.gold_pandas_code: from scipy import stats; pair = df[['improved_sanitation_pct','wasting_pct']].dropna(); result = stats.pearsonr(pair['improved_sanitation_pct'], pair['wasting_pct'])

questions.question: Is women's literacy correlated with institutional delivery rates?
questions.gold_pandas_code: from scipy import stats; pair = df[['women_literacy_pct','institutional_delivery_pct']].dropna(); result = stats.pearsonr(pair['women_literacy_pct'], pair['institutional_delivery_pct'])

questions.question: Is women's literacy associated with lower child marriage rates?
questions.gold_pandas_code: from scipy import stats; pair = df[['women_literacy_pct','child_marriage_pct']].dropna(); result = stats.pearsonr(pair['women_literacy_pct'], pair['child_marriage_pct'])

questions.question: Are districts with higher ANC coverage associated with lower stunting?
questions.gold_pandas_code: from scipy import stats; pair = df[['anc_4plus_visits_pct','stunting_pct']].dropna(); result = stats.pearsonr(pair['anc_4plus_visits_pct'], pair['stunting_pct'])

questions.question: Is clean cooking fuel access correlated with lower anaemia in women?
questions.gold_pandas_code: from scipy import stats; pair = df[['clean_cooking_fuel_pct','anaemia_all_women_pct']].dropna(); result = stats.pearsonr(pair['clean_cooking_fuel_pct'], pair['anaemia_all_women_pct'])

questions.question: Is health insurance coverage associated with higher institutional delivery rates?
questions.gold_pandas_code: from scipy import stats; pair = df[['health_insurance_pct','institutional_delivery_pct']].dropna(); result = stats.pearsonr(pair['health_insurance_pct'], pair['institutional_delivery_pct'])

questions.question: Is women's literacy correlated with anaemia prevalence?
questions.gold_pandas_code: from scipy import stats; pair = df[['women_literacy_pct','anaemia_all_women_pct']].dropna(); result = stats.pearsonr(pair['women_literacy_pct'], pair['anaemia_all_women_pct'])

questions.question: Is electricity access associated with better vaccination coverage?
questions.gold_pandas_code: from scipy import stats; pair = df[['electricity_access_pct','fully_vaccinated_recall_pct']].dropna(); result = stats.pearsonr(pair['electricity_access_pct'], pair['fully_vaccinated_recall_pct'])

questions.question: Do districts with clean cooking fuel have lower child stunting rates?
questions.gold_pandas_code: from scipy import stats; pair = df[['clean_cooking_fuel_pct','stunting_pct']].dropna(); result = stats.pearsonr(pair['clean_cooking_fuel_pct'], pair['stunting_pct'])

questions.question: Are districts with more ANC visits also more likely to have institutional deliveries?
questions.gold_pandas_code: from scipy import stats; pair = df[['anc_4plus_visits_pct','institutional_delivery_pct']].dropna(); result = stats.pearsonr(pair['anc_4plus_visits_pct'], pair['institutional_delivery_pct'])
